data.raceComments: {"comment":"1. IMPERIOUS GIRL is at the track for the first time. By Imperial Count and hails from the Craig Ferguson stable. Likely to get all the favours from this nice draw. Sure to prove tough to beat. 5. DAISYMEROLLIN was responsible for a very good effort last time over 2200m at Ascot Park Raceway, finishing second and just 1.4 metres from the winner. Meeting a deeper field this time but she good enough to play a major role. 7. BLARNEY STONE was easily accounted for when seventh over 2400m at this track recently at his first race start. Strips fitter and can improve. 2. PHISHING is close to a win after two successive placings, the latest a third over 2200m at Ascot Park Raceway after having led into the turn.","runners":[1,5,7,2],"exclusive":true}
